title: REPLACE WITH TITLE — suggested theme: starting before you feel ready / doing it when you're resistant
framing: Resistance is not a sign you should stop. It is a sign you are at the edge of something that matters.

title: REPLACE WITH TITLE — suggested theme: identity and discipline / who you become through consistent action
framing: Every rep, every session, every time you did the thing — it is already in you. This is just the next one.

title: REPLACE WITH TITLE — suggested theme: low energy / small starts / momentum from almost nothing
framing: You do not need to go hard today. You need to not quit. Those are different things.

title: REPLACE WITH TITLE — suggested theme: avoidance / the cost of not showing up / self-trust
framing: The gap between who you are and who you know you can be only closes one decision at a time. This is one of those decisions.
